calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Beverly Lund Trustee for Jurkiewicz Family Trust is present. Represented by Mike Fonti.
Attorney Karen Uchiyama appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Francis Fitzpatrick is present.
Attorney John C. Elsbree representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of July-23 -2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Off Calendar
